configurations.description: Whether to capture the query in `graphql.document` span attribute.
configurations.name: otel.instrumentation.graphql.capture-query

configurations.description: Enables sanitization of sensitive information from queries so they aren't added as span attributes.
configurations.name: otel.instrumentation.graphql.query-sanitization.enabled

configurations.description: Whether GraphQL operation name is added to the span name. WARNING: The GraphQL operation name is provided by the client and can have high cardinality. Use only when the server is not exposed to malicious clients.
configurations.name: otel.instrumentation.graphql.operation-name-in-span-name.enabled

description: This instrumentation enables spans for GraphQL operations.
name: graphql-java-12.0
